title: clinopodium inodorum
intro: Clinopodium inodorum, also known as wild basil or sweet basil, is a perennial herb native to North America. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Clinopodium inodorum include soothing digestive problems, reducing fever, and easing respiratory issues such as colds and bronchitis. Clinopodium inodorum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for a range of uses in natural remedies and traditional medicine.
